name: Beef and Shrimp Kabobs
recipeInstructions:
1. To make marinade, combine salad dressing, catsup, red wine, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper.
2. Cut steak into 1-1/2 inch cubes.
3. Put steak cubes and raw shrimp in marinade and let stand in refrigerator for 3 hours.
4. Remove beef and shrimp from marinade; alternate 8 beef cubes and 8 shrimp on 6 skewers, using squares of bacon, slices of green pepper, onion, and mushrooms between meats.
5. Place skewers 4 to 6 inches above medium heat on grill.
6. Cook 8 to 10 minutes on each side, brushing with marinade occasionally.
